description:
ATXMIC BXMB 
Made In Hell the Album drops 21/07/23.
https://scarlxrd.lnk.to/madeinhell

;;

Lyrics; 
Wasted every second 
Living like I would regret it 
I just had to reinvent myself 
Of course you cant relate.
Better than I've ever been 
The medicine is defining 
It's king scarlxrd on your brain.  

Flowing like my big bro Mage. 
Kicking in the door no raid  
Sipping on the liquor made me sway 
Im living in your mind rent free.
Let me do my dance like what 
Every single chance I get. 
Make 'em take a chance on the boy 
Metal to your face say sum?
I never settle been going in sick 
Upping my level you know what it is 
Nigga be careful we know where you live. 
I switched up my mental and got me some bricks.

Okay bitch you want a lullaby 
Tell me how you can’t survive 
All your moves are out of spite 
I know that you want a life like mine. 
But you can’t survive. 
Bitch we are not in the same conversation 
Cant survive 
None of you pussies are worth my attention 
Cant survive 
People think they know me can you stop with the questions 
Cant survive 
Pay the price and ill confess it.

God 
God 
Don’t get close 
Don’t get close 
Don’t get close 
Don’t get close to me 
Don’t get close 
Don’t get close 
Don’t get close 
Don’t get close to me 
Aghhhhh 
I fucked my head up 100%
Wanna try press me about what I’m doing 
the last time i checked they all on the decent. 
I never need consent 
Never gonna take your advice you ain’t got my respect 
I never need consent 
Ill fuck your head up 100%.



///-🎞️-FILM CREW-🎞️-///
Directed by; James Barns 
D.O.P; Bud Gallimore
Executive Producer; Henry Napier-Brown.
Assistnat Camera; Gábor szebeni
Gaffer; Don Harlon
Production Manager; Krisztián Nagy  
Drone Op; Péter László
PA Géza Kis 
Edit; M.L.
Colour Grade; Nathaniel Skeels
BTS; Dávid Dózsa
